CustomField.description: Types of monthly rent calculations. For variable Rent: there will be a base (say $100), a multiplier (say 1.1) and will be tied to Libor (say its 2% for a certain mo). Calculation would be 100*1.1 = 110. and then adjust down by 2% (calculated on 100). So net amount would be 108. Also, may have a floor or ceiling. If the ceiling is 107, then you pay 107 instead of 108. Base Multiplier Libor Value = Base * Multiplier - (Base*LIBOR)
CustomField.label: _Rent Type

value.fullName: Power By The Hour With a minimum
value.label: Power By The Hour With a minimum
